# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app1.example.com
        - https://app2.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - User-Agent
      max_age: 86400
      credentials: true
    enabled: true
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-KEY
      run_on_preflight: true
    enabled: true
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      limit_by: consumer
      policy: local
      sync_rate: -1
      hide_client_headers: false
    enabled: true
services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://localhost:8080
    routes:
      - name: example-route
        paths:
          - /api/*
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app1.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
              headers:
                - Content-Type
              credentials: true
            enabled: true
          - name: key-auth
            enabled: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500
              limit_by: consumer
              policy: local
            enabled: true
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app1.example.com
            - https://app2.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - DELETE
          headers:
            - Content-Type
            - Authorization
          credentials: true
        enabled: true
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 1000
          limit_by: consumer
          policy: local
        enabled: true
